consumed.shape: persisted shared-input bundle JSON consumed through --bundle-path and bootstrapped by bootstrap.init when starting from zero local state
bounded transcribed voice-note JSON object consumed through --payload-json or --payload-path by submit.voice_note

produced.notes: submit.hydration, submit.meal, and submit.voice_note regenerate both the dated and latest artifacts on success.
recommendation.create writes exactly one day-scoped recommendation artifact and fails closed on malformed payloads, scope mismatches, invalid context artifacts, or ungrounded evidence refs.

args.description: Path to the persisted shared input bundle JSON.
args.name: bundle_path

args.description: Scoped Health Lab user identifier.
args.name: user_id

args.description: ISO date for the requested daily scope, YYYY-MM-DD.
args.name: date

bootstrap.init.description: Create one canonical empty shared-input bundle and fail closed if the target path already exists.

args.description: Path to an agent_readable_daily_context JSON artifact.
args.name: artifact_path

args.description: Scoped Health Lab user identifier.
args.name: user_id

args.description: ISO date expected inside the artifact, YYYY-MM-DD.
args.name: date

context.get.description: Read one dated agent-readable daily context artifact.

args.description: Path to the latest agent_readable_daily_context JSON artifact.
args.name: artifact_path

args.description: Scoped Health Lab user identifier.
args.name: user_id

context.get_latest.description: Read the latest agent-readable daily context artifact scoped to one user.

contract.describe.description: Return this contract description as machine-readable JSON.

args.description: Directory where dated and latest recommendation artifacts are written.
args.name: output_dir

args.description: Recommendation payload JSON object string. Exactly one of --payload-json or --payload-path is required.
args.name: payload_json

args.description: Path to one recommendation payload JSON file. Exactly one of --payload-json or --payload-path is required.
args.name: payload_path

recommendation.create.description: Write one validated day-scoped recommendation artifact grounded in one scoped daily context artifact.

payload_shape.notes: All evidence_refs must already exist in the referenced agent_readable_daily_context and the payload user_id/date must match that context scope.

args.description: Scoped Health Lab user identifier.
args.name: user_id

args.description: ISO date for the requested daily scope, YYYY-MM-DD.
args.name: date

args.description: Path to one scoped read-only artifact when retrieval is backed by a local artifact file.
args.name: artifact_path

args.description: Required non-empty request identifier. Daily retrieval ops validate it and echo it back under validation.request_echo.
args.name: request_id

args.description: Required ISO 8601 timestamp with timezone information. Daily retrieval ops validate it and echo it back under validation.request_echo.
args.name: requested_at

args.description: Whether to include surfaced conflicts in the retrieval response.
args.name: include_conflicts

args.description: Whether to include explicit missingness notes in the retrieval response.
args.name: include_missingness

args.description: Scoped Health Lab user identifier.
args.name: user_id

args.description: Inclusive ISO start date for range-scoped retrieval, YYYY-MM-DD.
args.name: start_date

args.description: Inclusive ISO end date for range-scoped retrieval, YYYY-MM-DD.
args.name: end_date

args.description: External user-owned memory reference or locator. Health Lab does not host the backing store.
args.name: memory_locator

args.name: request_id

args.name: requested_at

args.name: timezone

args.description: Whether to include explicit missingness notes in the retrieval response.
args.name: include_missingness

retrieve.weekly_pattern_review.description: Return one bounded seven-day weekly pattern review aggregated only from accepted daily context artifacts listed by a bounded memory locator fixture, with request metadata validated and echoed under validation.request_echo.

args.name: collected_at

args.name: amount_ml

args.description: Optional free-text note.
args.name: notes
